It is never too late to be what you migh: It is never too late to be what you might have been.
You've gotta dance like there's nobody w: You've gotta dance like there's nobody watching, Love like you'll never be hurt, Sing like there's nobody listening, And live like it's heaven on earth.
Yesterday is history, tomorrow is a myst: Yesterday is history, tomorrow is a mystery, today is a gift of God, which is why we call it the present.
Everything you can imagine is real.
Life isn't about finding yourself. Life: Life isn't about finding yourself. Life is about creating yourself.
It's the possibility of having a dream c: It's the possibility of having a dream come true that makes life interesting.
Be yourself; everyone else is already ta: Be yourself; everyone else is already taken.
Promise me you’ll always remember: You’r: Promise me you’ll always remember: You’re braver than you believe, and stronger than you seem, and smarter than you think.
So many things are possible just as long: So many things are possible just as long as you don’t know they’re impossible.
Your vision will become clear only when: Your vision will become clear only when you can look into your own heart. Who looks outside, dreams; who looks inside, awakes.
Challenges are gifts that force us to se: Challenges are gifts that force us to search for a new center of gravity. Don’t fight them. Just find a new way to stand.
Most of the important things in the worl: Most of the important things in the world have been accomplished by people who have kept on trying when there seemed to be no hope at all.
In any given moment we have two options:: In any given moment we have two options: to step forward into growth or step back into safety.
Change is inevitable. Growth is optional: Change is inevitable. Growth is optional.
We have to continually be jumping off cl: We have to continually be jumping off cliffs and developing our wings on the way down.
Just believe in yourself. Even if you do: Just believe in yourself. Even if you don’t, pretend that you do and, at some point, you will.
A problem is a chance for you to do your: A problem is a chance for you to do your best.
May your choices reflect your hopes, not: May your choices reflect your hopes, not your fears.
Don’t be afraid to give up the good to g: Don’t be afraid to give up the good to go for the great.
Do what you have always done and you’ll: Do what you have always done and you’ll get what you have always got.
Don’t blow off another’s candle for it w: Don’t blow off another’s candle for it won’t make yours shine brighter.
